programs.title: Wild Tales from the Farm
programs.desc: It’s spring, and the farm is bursting with new life. Watch a ewe give birth to twins, an orphaned Hereford calf struggle to find a surrogate mother, and the top hen nestle down in her maternity coop.

programs.title: Cub Camp
programs.desc: Get to know Winston, a tiny abandoned cub who imprints on Judy as she nurses him 24-7. Feel the heartbreak as she severs their emotional attachment and teaches this sweet little fellow how to be a grown-up, independent bear in the non-human world.

director: Merit Jensen Carr: Producer, Shereen Jerret: Producer

programs.title: Coral City
programs.desc: Discover the most fantastic city of them all lying beneath the waves, where romance and migratory commuters flood the coral reef’s main highways. Follow a green sea turtle looking for love and sit in with a cassowary dad tending his newborn chicks.

director: Craig Meade, Alan Erson: Executive Producers, Siddharth Nambiar: Director

programs.title: Africa's Hidden Kingdoms
programs.desc: This small park makes a big difference to endangered animals. Offering sanctuary to some of the biggest and smallest animals on the planet, witness how species come back from the edge of extinction to reclaim their place in Africa’s wilderness.

programs.title: Africa's Hidden Kingdoms
programs.desc: Considered to be the most beautiful of the Cape’s protected areas, Kogelberg Nature Reserve has experienced minimal human interference. Discover the spectacular land and sea life flourishing in this unique botanical wonderland.

programs.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programs.desc: Witness some big changes when four cute new arrivals join the nursery classes. And for a handful of adolescent males that are growing too big and boisterous for their babysitters, it’s their last day at forest school.
